title: Generate 7 Publication-Quality Figures from Experiment Outputs
summary: Demo notebook that generates 7 publication-quality matplotlib figures from pre-computed experiment data for the Signed Spectral FIGS paper: (1) pipeline diagram, (2) critical difference diagram with Friedman test (χ²=37.1, p<0.0001), (3) grouped accuracy bars for 8 methods across 7 datasets, (4) arity-accuracy Pareto scatter, (5) signed-vs-unsigned Hedges' g forest plot, (6) module recovery Jaccard bars, and (7) log-log scaling analysis with power-law fits. Uses mini_demo_data.json containing accuracy data for 56 dataset-method pairs, effect sizes for 13 comparisons, Jaccard scores for 20 recovery experiments, and timing data for 14 scaling datasets.
